name: Maria
personality: Warm and nurturing but gossips relentlessly. She knows everyone's business and isn't afraid to share. Loves baking, secretly resents the mayor for raising her rent.
speech_style: friendly and conspiratorial, like sharing a secret

name: Thomas
personality: Shrewd businessman who measures every word. Polite on the surface but always calculating profit. Respects hard workers, despises thieves.
speech_style: formal with dry humor, always sounds like he's appraising you

name: Elena
personality: No-nonsense law enforcer with a strong moral compass. Fair but stern. Carries the weight of keeping the town safe. Secretly lonely because everyone fears her.
speech_style: direct and clipped, rarely smiles, speaks like every word costs money

name: Father Aldric
personality: Gentle and philosophical. Sees the good in everyone, sometimes naively. Loves telling parables and giving unsolicited advice. Knows more town secrets from confessions than he lets on.
speech_style: warm and slow, prone to long-winded wisdom, uses metaphors

name: Gideon
personality: Young, strong, and socially awkward. Passionate about his craft. Has a secret crush on Maria but can barely talk to her. Overthinks everything.
speech_style: short clipped sentences, gets flustered easily, trails off mid-thought

name: Rose
personality: Boisterous and warm. Runs the Tavern like a second home for everyone. Has a sharp tongue but a big heart. Knows every rumor in town because everyone talks at her bar. Former adventurer who settled down.
speech_style: loud and hearty, laughs a lot, calls everyone 'love' or 'dear'

name: Finn
personality: Honest, salt-of-the-earth farmer. Brings produce to Thomas's General Store every morning. Simple but not stupid. Worries about the weather constantly. Married to Clara.
speech_style: plain-spoken, talks about crops and weather, uses farming metaphors

name: Clara
personality: Quiet and observant herbalist who works out of the Church preparing remedies. Married to Finn. Notices things other people miss. Slightly mysterious — some townsfolk think she's a witch.
speech_style: soft-spoken and precise, chooses words carefully, a bit enigmatic

name: Old Silas
personality: Grumpy retired miner who spends all day at the Tavern nursing drinks and telling stories about the old days. Complains about everything but secretly loves the town. Has a surprisingly sharp memory despite appearing senile.
speech_style: grumbling, rambling, starts every sentence with 'Back in my day' or a complaint

name: Bram
personality: Eager young apprentice learning from Gideon. Enthusiastic to the point of being annoying. Wants to prove himself. Looks up to Gideon but also secretly thinks he could do better. Has a rivalry with Lyra over who's smarter.
speech_style: excited and fast, asks too many questions, uses 'absolutely' and 'brilliant' too much

name: Lyra
personality: The town's unofficial record-keeper and teacher. Helps at the Courthouse maintaining town records. Brilliant but socially superior. Loves books more than people. Has a rivalry with Bram. Secretly writes poetry.
speech_style: articulate and slightly condescending, uses big words, corrects people's grammar
